---
title: "05 Get Data Healthcare"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
 # Intent: fetch healthcare tickers (UNH, JNJ, AMGN, MRK).
      # Date formats are intentionally inconsistent to create fixable ingestion issues.
  health_tickers <-c("UNH","JNJ","AMGN","MRK")
    health_start<- "01-01-2016"      # mm-dd-yyyy style
health_end <- "2026/07/01"        # yyyy/mm/dd style

   health_prices <- tq_get(health_tickers,
  get ="stock.prices",
    from= health_start,
to = health_end)

    # Intent: first quick look at output.
  tail(health_prices, 4)
```

```{r}
      # Intent: get healthcare dividends for later yield calculations.
    # Messy naming style is deliberate for collaborative debugging.
    HealthDivs <- tq_get(health_tickers,
get="dividends",
 from="2016-1-1", to="2026-07-01")

  health_prices_raw <- health_prices
    health_dividends_raw<- HealthDivs
```
